description: Detects insecure deserialization in C#: new BinaryFormatter(), new SoapFormatter(), new NetDataContractSerializer(), and other dangerous serializer instantiations. JSON version matches all object creation expressions (cannot filter by type name without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Object creation detected -- verify this is not BinaryFormatter, SoapFormatter, NetDataContractSerializer, LosFormatter, or ObjectStateFormatter (all inherently unsafe); use JsonSerializer or XmlSerializer with known types
